nodes.label: Security Audit Non-Disclosure Policy
nodes.rationale: Detailed security audit findings (vulnerabilities, attack vectors, internal mitigations, secrets) are intentionally excluded from the versioned docs site: documenting weaknesses would hand attackers a map. Kept in a private channel (password manager / internal wiki / private issue) instead. Secrets (SECRET_KEY, DATABASE_URL, SMTP/APNs creds) live only in environment variables, never in code or docs.
